title: allosorus dealbatus
intro: Allosorus dealbatus, also known as the rough spike moss, is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Allosorus. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Allosorus dealbatus include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and improving breathing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine for its therapeutic effects.
